nasb.text: So when He heard that he was sick, He then stayed two days longer in the place where He was.

esv.text: So, when he heard that Lazarus was ill, he stayed two days longer in the place where he was.

cnv.text: 他聽說拉撒路病了，仍然在原來的地方住了兩天，

ccb.text: 可是祂听到拉撒路有病的消息后，仍逗留了两天，

csbs.text: 然而当他听说拉撒路患了病，还继续在原来的地方住了两天，
